item.title: Home
item.description: ● All posts. The posts (or blogs) are mainly about what I think in studying computer science. ● About me. It’s my self-introduction. ● Tags. You can search for a certain post by these tags.

item.title: About
item.description: Hi! My name is Zhicheng Chen. I am studying for a bachelor degree in School of Computer Science and Engineering, Central South University. My interests include Computer Architecture and Linux kernel . E-mail: zchengchen0411@gmail.com
